project: Mind the Gap Together — Resource Portal

chat_phases.title: Initial Site Review
chat_phases.summary: Reviewed existing index.html for MtGT-C. Site was a single-page HTML app with hardcoded data. Tabs, housing cards, food pantries, healthcare, jobs all hardcoded. Identified need for admin portal, data layer, and dynamic content.

chat_phases.title: Admin Portal Build
chat_phases.summary: Built admin.html from scratch — dark theme CMS with login gate (admin/mtgt2026), dashboard stats, CRUD for food pantries/housing/jobs/fairs/resources, drawer forms with day toggles and accepts pickers, export JSON button.

chat_phases.title: GitHub & Netlify Setup
chat_phases.summary: User pushed admin.html to GitHub repo. Netlify auto-deployed. Identified /admin folder contains legacy Netlify CMS — left alone. New admin.html lives in root.
chat_phases.key_decision: admin.html in root, not in /admin folder

chat_phases.title: Data Layer
chat_phases.summary: Created data.json with all hardcoded content (10 food pantries, 6 housing, 5 jobs, 2 fairs, 26 resources). Updated index.html to fetch('data.json') instead of hardcoded arrays. Built buildHousingCards(), buildJobListings(), buildJobFairs(), buildFoodCards() functions.

chat_phases.title: Netlify Forms Integration
chat_phases.summary: Added data-netlify=true to all 8 forms in index.html. Converted div-based forms to proper form tags with name attributes. Forms: navigator-request, volunteer-application, job-posting, job-application, rental-listing, ssi-advocate, mentor-request, donation.

chat_phases.title: Bug Fix — Tabs Not Working
chat_phases.summary: Discovered typo in updateCounty() function: lector('select...') instead of document.querySelector('select...'). This crashed the entire JS causing all tabs to fail. Fixed and redeployed.
chat_phases.bug: lector() instead of document.querySelector() crashed all JS

chat_phases.title: One-Click Publish
chat_phases.summary: Added publishToGitHub() function to admin.html. Initially used direct GitHub API calls with tokens in frontend code — triggered GitHub secret scanner. Moved to Netlify Functions approach.
chat_phases.issue: GitHub auto-revokes tokens detected in public repos

chat_phases.title: Netlify Functions — Secure Token Proxy
chat_phases.summary: Created publish.js and submissions.js in netlify/functions/. Tokens moved to Netlify environment variables (GITHUB_TOKEN, NETLIFY_TOKEN). Admin portal calls /.netlify/functions/publish and /.netlify/functions/submissions instead of APIs directly.
chat_phases.key_fix: Netlify Site UUID (ecb41d3a-bc77-43e9-b3fe-6b39ec92683f) needed for API, not site name

chat_phases.title: Submissions Inbox Tabs
chat_phases.summary: Built tabbed submissions system in admin: Publish Queue (job-posting, rental-listing with Approve & Publish), To Review (navigator, volunteer, ssi, mentor), Donations, Done. Field names fixed to match Netlify's title case format (Job Title not job-title). FORM_FIELDS mapping for display. markDone() moves cards to Done tab.
chat_phases.key_fix: Netlify converts field names to title case with spaces

chat_phases.title: Auto-Publish on Save/Delete
chat_phases.summary: Updated deleteItem() and saveDrawer() in admin to automatically call publishToGitHub() after every change. No more manual publish needed for routine edits.

chat_phases.title: Brand Refresh
chat_phases.summary: Fetched mindthegaptogether.org to extract brand colors. Converted AVIF logo to PNG, extracted dominant colors: #1889c6 (primary blue), #0f78b4 (deep blue). Updated CSS variables throughout. Replaced hero/search section with clean banner. Added Montserrat font. Banner now 96px, white background, real logo image links to org site, MIND THE GAP TOGETHER + RESOURCE PORTAL text.

chat_phases.title: Quick Filter Pills
chat_phases.summary: Added quick-filter pill buttons to Housing, Healthcare, Resources, and Jobs tabs. Pills jump to sub-sections and trigger filters in one tap. Designed for mobile-first and iOS readiness.

chat_phases.title: Navigation Cleanup
chat_phases.summary: Moved Donate Goods card from Donate tab to bottom of Resources tab. Added Support card linking to MtGT.org. Changed Donate tab to direct external link to mindthegaptogether.org/contact. Added ⚙ Admin button to banner top right. Added ★ Saves button to banner.

chat_phases.title: Saves System (Phase 1)
chat_phases.summary: Built localStorage-based saves system. ☆/★ toggle button on every card. Saved cards get green border and background tint. ★ Saves button in banner shows badge count. Saves modal groups saved items by category with remove buttons and Clear All. Works on iOS Safari. Dynamic cards get save buttons from builders; static cards get them added by addSaveBtnsToStaticCards() on load.

key_decisions: Flat file architecture (data.json) instead of database — simple, free, Git-versioned
Netlify Functions as secure proxy — tokens never in frontend code
localStorage for saves — no login required for Phase 1
Supabase chosen for Phase 2 client accounts
PWA before native iOS app — faster, cheaper, reuses existing code
Quick filter pills instead of hero search bar — cleaner, mobile-first
Donate tab → external link to MtGT.org (short term)
Admin password in admin.html (search ADMIN_PASS to update)
diffchecker.com workflow before every GitHub commit

netlify.purpose: GitHub PAT with repo scope — for publish.js to push data.json
Netlify API token — for submissions.js to fetch form submissions

important_gotchas: GitHub classic token (not fine-grained) required with repo scope
GitHub auto-revokes tokens found in public repo code
Netlify secret scanner blocks commits with raw tokens
Netlify site name ≠ Site UUID — API needs UUID: ecb41d3a-bc77-43e9-b3fe-6b39ec92683f
Netlify converts form field names to Title Case With Spaces
Environment variable changes require manual Netlify redeploy
Admin password (ADMIN_PASS) gets overwritten when new admin.html generated — always update after upload
Always use diffchecker.com before committing new generated files
/admin folder is legacy Netlify CMS — do not modify or delete
Food pantry days stored as ['Mon','Tue'...] 3-letter abbreviations

netlify_forms.name: volunteer-application
fields: Why do you want to volunteer?

netlify_forms.name: mentor-request
fields: What kind of help do you need?

phase_3_pwa.changes: Meta tags in index.html, app icon set
phase_3_pwa.benefit: Installable on iOS/Android home screen, works offline

future: Donation flow: view → thank you email → payment portal
